programs.title: Daria
programs.desc: Two wacky radio DJs broadcast their show outside of Lawndale High, and Daria's grandma Ruth moves into the Morgendorffer household after Jake suffers a medical emergency.

programs.title: Daria
programs.desc: The residents of Lawndale are drawn to a new big box store that caters to their various needs, where Daria and Jane look for gummi bears for an art project.

programs.title: Daria
programs.desc: Daria and Jane wonder if aliens have taken over their town after Secret Service agents urge the students at Lawndale High to report anyone who exhibits strange behaviors.

programs.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programs.desc: Beavis and Butt-head find a dead animal and try to sell its fur. But Beavis soon becomes attached to the lifeless creature.

programs.desc: While causing mischief at a drive-in movie theatre, Beavis & Butt-head experience a new phase of the moon.

programs.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programs.desc: Beavis and Butt-head's worst fears are realized when they have to kill two hours, until something good comes on TV.
